# INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.inProgress

**Case**

The app is preparing to play the media content.

## Declaration

```swift
case inProgress
```

## Discussion

Respond with this code when your app needs more time to load the media before playing it.

## App

- **INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.success**: The app is playing the media.
